mock_tests.title: Google Systems Mock Test
mock_tests.content: Design a scalable video streaming backend. Include storage, CDN, and replication strategies.

mock_tests.title: Google DSA Mock Test
mock_tests.content: 3 problems: arrays, trees, graphs. 30 minutes total.

mock_tests.title: Amazon System Design Mock
mock_tests.content: Design a highly available e-commerce checkout system.

mock_tests.title: Meta Data Systems Mock
mock_tests.content: Design a distributed analytics pipeline for ranking social posts.
